name: Dragonchess
author: Gary Gygax (Dragon Magazine #100, 1985)
description: Gary Gygax's three-dimensional fantasy chess (Dragon Magazine #100, 1985), played on three stacked 8x12 boards — Sky, Ground and Underworld — with fifteen kinds of D&D creatures: Sylphs, Griffins and a Dragon that captures from afar in the sky; the usual court plus Warriors, Heroes, Paladins and a Mage on the ground; and Basilisks that freeze the pieces above them, Elementals and Dwarves in the underworld. Checkmate the enemy King.
